notes: Achievement + unlock catalogue. Each entry declares an id, title, description, trigger condition, and an optional reward. Conditions are evaluated by TarotGauntletGame on _trigger_win and _trigger_loss; un-cleared achievements that newly satisfy fire SaveSystem.mark_unlocked(unlock_key) and any reward. The AchievementsPanel reads this list + SaveSystem to render the codex of what's been earned. Per-arcana complete entries (priestess/empress/emperor/hierophant/lovers/chariot) have been removed pending canon-aligned rebuild — they referenced scenarios that were Claude-invented and have been retired. Will be re-added as canonical scenarios land.

achievements.title: FIRST LEAP
achievements.desc: Win any Tarot Gauntlet scenario for the first time.

achievements.title: REVERSED, FIRST TIME
achievements.desc: Lose any Tarot Gauntlet scenario for the first time. There is always another night.

achievements.title: JOHN'S WHOLE SHIFT
achievements.desc: Win all three Fool scenarios (THE LEAP, THE RUSH, FULL HOUSE).

achievements.title: FRASIER'S WHOLE EVENING
achievements.desc: Win all three Magician scenarios (SINKING FEELING, WATCH PARTY, BLOW OUT THE CANDLES).

achievements.title: DANTE'S WHOLE DAY
achievements.desc: Win all three Emperor scenarios (DOCKET, FIRST SESSION, APPEAL). Pending canon reframe — current scenarios were authored before the riverboat-helm canon settled.

achievements.title: THE HOUSE HELD
achievements.desc: Win all three Lovers scenarios (THE FAUCET WINS, HE WAVED, TODAY THE DRIP CAN WIN). The Roberts kept patching the holes. It was what they did.

achievements.title: THE MORNING HELD
achievements.desc: Reach SYNC 6 in a Lovers scenario with Philip at the same threshold. Philip's arms around you from behind. The radio finishes its weather report and moves on to the obituaries.

achievements.title: HE NEVER WAVED
achievements.desc: Open the Polaroid in HE WAVED and complete the scenario.

achievements.title: EMBER & ASH HELD
achievements.desc: Win all three Chariot scenarios (THE HOT OFFICE, TWO HORSES ONE WRECK, OPTION FOUR). Antonio survived the day. The doom is on a longer horizon.

achievements.title: THE BEAM HELD
achievements.desc: Reach 6 progress in a Chariot scenario without taking Option Four. Antonio made the day on his own.

achievements.title: YOU DON'T ASK ME WHAT IT MEANS
achievements.desc: Invoke Antonio's Option Four ultimate. Jimmy handled it. You did not ask.

achievements.title: THE FIRST SEPTENARY
achievements.desc: Win at least one scenario in each of the first 7 arcanas (Fool through Chariot).

achievements.title: WITHOUT A WALK-OUT
achievements.desc: Win any scenario without a single visitor walking out.

achievements.title: KEPT THE FAITH
achievements.desc: Win any scenario with Doubt at 0 at the moment of LEAP.

achievements.title: THE ROOM HELD
achievements.desc: Win any scenario with Stagnation under 4 at the moment of LEAP.

achievements.title: THE CANDLES ARE LIT
achievements.desc: Light the candles in BLOW OUT THE CANDLES.

achievements.title: THE OFFICE RULED
achievements.desc: Use THE DECREE ability in an Emperor session.

achievements.title: SURVIVOR · MAGICIAN
achievements.desc: Win a Magician scenario with at least one demon active at the moment of LEAP — the room was working against you and you made it anyway.

achievements.title: THE SINKHOLE OPENS
achievements.desc: Lose BLOW OUT THE CANDLES with the steamboat finished. The river found the bank.
